_meta.notes: CCA generation rates by provider and schedule. These replace the PG&E generation component for CCA customers. Effective rate = PG&E delivery + CCA generation + PCIA vintage.

E-ELEC._notes: Winter rates updated from Feb 2026 bill (new lower rates effective ~Feb 1 2026). Summer rates approximate — verify against PCE rate sheet. Previous winter rates were peak $0.10592, part $0.08795, off $0.07593.

E-ELEC_pre_feb2026._notes: Historical rates prior to Feb 2026 reduction. Useful for validating against older bills.

E-TOU-C._notes: Estimated from EV2-A pattern (two-period, same peak hours). Verify against PCE rate sheet.

E-TOU-D._notes: Estimated. E-TOU-D has narrower peak (5-8PM weekdays). Verify against PCE rate sheet.

MCE.name: MCE (formerly Marin Clean Energy)
MCE.territory: Marin, Napa, Contra Costa, Solano counties

schedules._notes: For bundled customers, use the 'generation' component from pge_rates.json directly. No PCIA applies.
